name: Dilip Buildcon Limited
summary: Dilip Buildcon Limited, together its subsidiaries, engages in the development of infrastructure facilities on engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) basis in India. It operates in two segments, EPC Projects and Toll Operations. The company undertakes state and national highway, city road, culvert, and bridge operation and maintenance projects; and irrigation, urban development, dam, canal, tunnel, metro rail viaducts, water supply, coal mining, water sanitation and sewage, airport, industrial, commercial and residential building, and other projects. It is also involved in the maintenance of road infrastructure facilities; and toll operations. In addition, the company engages in the repair and installation of machinery and equipment, motor vehicles, and other related activities, as well as job work activities. Dilip Buildcon Limited was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Bhopal, India.
